description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume is for the women who explore the far and the beyond. Product Details Rasasi Romance is a perfume spray for women with a green, floral, fruity and musky fragrance. Top notes are hyacinth, galbanum and ylang - ylang. Middle notes are rose and jasmine. Base notes are apricot, raspberry, peach, cedarwood, musk and sandalwood. The perfume comes in a frosted green bottle with a dome shaped golden cap. Size 45 ml
